name: fixitnow
description: FixItNow monorepo — a full-stack home services marketplace.
author: Sachin Rajawat <sachinrajawat835@gmail.com>

scripts.dev:web: npm run build:types && npm run dev --workspace @fixitnow/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:types && npm run dev --workspace @fixitnow/api
scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:api: npm run build:types && npm run build --workspace @fixitnow/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:types && npm run build --workspace @fixitnow/web
